checks.notes: The deck moves from KPI momentum to rollout proof, residency risk, and the next-week expansion decision.
The Data Story structure is varied enough, though two adjacent slides share a similar insight-card rhythm.
Activation, latency, staged cohorts, incidents, residency risk, and decision facts are preserved without invented values.
No placeholders or raw IR appear; minor polish issues remain in a chart label and one title line break.
Data Story is a good fit for this KPI-heavy rollout decision.
All slides include useful speaker notes, but the notes are concise rather than fully speaker-ready.

summary: Live deck is complete and faithful, with minor polish and visual rhythm issues that should remain visible in the baseline.
